title: Gather your information - Canada.ca
content:
## Gather your information
If you need a business number (BN) or program account with the CRA, you may need to have the following information ready when you register:

## Gather what you need to register
- Your personal and basic business information Information businesses may need to provide: Name, title, and phone number of owners Social Insurance Number (SIN) of owners Legal and operating business names Mailing and physical addresses Type of business (for example: sole proprietor , partnership , corporation , domestic worker , trust) Description of major business activity Main products or services with estimated percentage of revenue Incorporation date, jurisdiction and certificate number, if applicable

### Your personal and basic business information
Information businesses may need to provide:
- Name, title, and phone number of owners
- Social Insurance Number (SIN) of owners
- Legal and operating business names
- Mailing and physical addresses
- Type of business (for example: sole proprietor , partnership , corporation , domestic worker , trust)
- Description of major business activity
- Main products or services with estimated percentage of revenue
- Incorporation date, jurisdiction and certificate number, if applicable
- Your existing business number (BN) if you have one If you already have a 9-digit BN, you need to provide it and verify some information to match what the CRA has on file. Examples of numbers you cannot use: Ontario Business Identification Number (BIN) Quebec Enterprise Number (NEQ) If you can't find your BN, you can get help to find an existing BN . If you don’t have a BN, you may get one as part of your registration.

### Your existing business number (BN) if you have one
If you already have a 9-digit BN, you need to provide it and verify some information to match what the CRA has on file.
Examples of numbers you cannot use:
- Ontario Business Identification Number (BIN)
- Quebec Enterprise Number (NEQ)
If you can't find your BN, you can get help to find an existing BN .
If you don’t have a BN, you may get one as part of your registration.
- Other information you need for certain program accounts To register for the following CRA program accounts, you will need to provide additional details: GST/HST (RT) You may need to provide the following: Amount of your annual worldwide and domestic GST/HST taxable sales Effective date of registration Fiscal year-end Reporting period For non-residents You may also need to provide the following where applicable: Type of products or services the business provides Filing method (simplified or normal) Canadian banking information Addresses in Canada (for example: branch, office, books and records, product storage) Payroll deductions (RP) You may need to provide the following where applicable: Months of operation Months covered for payroll of employee wages Number of employees Expected annual salaries for employees Date employees receive their first wages Frequency of pay period (for example: weekly, monthly, quarterly) Country of parent or affiliate, subsidiary, or head office of franchise Corporation income tax (RC) You may need to provide your corporation name. For non-residents You must also indicate if you will file certain special elections or special returns. Registered charity (RR) You may need to provide the following where applicable: Type of account needed: Charity Canadian amateur athletic association (CAAA) National arts service organization (NASO) Books and records address Information returns (RZ) You may need to provide the following where applicable: Effective date of registration Account types: T5 group Tax-free savings account (TFSA) Contract payments (T5018) Compliance and exchange Partnerships For non-residents You must also indicate if you will file certain special elections or special returns. Digital services tax (DT) You may need to provide: Legal name Name and phone number of at least one officer or director Luxury Tax (LT) You may need to provide the following where applicable: Type of item you are selling or importing Effective date of registration Books and records address Underused Housing Tax (RU) You may need to provide the following where applicable: Effective date of registration Books and records address You may need to provide additional information based on your specific business activities for the following program accounts: Air Travellers Security Charge (RG) Excise duties (RD) Excise taxes (RE)

### Other information you need for certain program accounts
To register for the following CRA program accounts, you will need to provide additional details:
You may need to provide the following:
- Amount of your annual worldwide and domestic GST/HST taxable sales
- Effective date of registration
You may also need to provide the following where applicable:
- Type of products or services the business provides
- Filing method (simplified or normal)
- Canadian banking information
- Addresses in Canada (for example: branch, office, books and records, product storage)
You may need to provide the following where applicable:
- Months covered for payroll of employee wages
- Expected annual salaries for employees
- Date employees receive their first wages
- Frequency of pay period (for example: weekly, monthly, quarterly)
- Country of parent or affiliate, subsidiary, or head office of franchise
You may need to provide your corporation name.
You must also indicate if you will file certain special elections or special returns.
You may need to provide the following where applicable:
- Type of account needed: Charity Canadian amateur athletic association (CAAA) National arts service organization (NASO)
- Canadian amateur athletic association (CAAA)
- National arts service organization (NASO)
- Books and records address
You may need to provide the following where applicable:
- Effective date of registration
- Tax-free savings account (TFSA)
- Contract payments (T5018)
- Compliance and exchange
You must also indicate if you will file certain special elections or special returns.
You may need to provide:
- Name and phone number of at least one officer or director
You may need to provide the following where applicable:
- Type of item you are selling or importing
- Effective date of registration
- Books and records address
You may need to provide the following where applicable:
- Effective date of registration
- Books and records address
You may need to provide additional information based on your specific business activities for the following program accounts:
- Air Travellers Security Charge (RG)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
